title: IEC 62443 Zone and Conduit Compliance Monitoring

compliance.assurance_rationale: IEC 62443 FR 6.2 Continuous monitoring — zone-and-conduit compliance monitoring is the direct implementation of the FR 6.2 continuous-monitoring requirement for IACS.
NERC CIP-005-7 R1 Electronic security perimeter — zone/conduit monitoring aligns with the ESP boundary-monitoring requirement.
TSA SD02C III.D Cybersecurity assessment — continuous zone-and-conduit monitoring supports the recurring pipeline-cybersecurity assessment.
